change: Added persistent innovation watchlist, amendment candidates, discussion queue and governed merge tracking.
reason: Prevent high-value daily recommendations from being lost in chat history.
rollback: Restore dashboard blob eb4c8cd6900422888b1f4ad5530436991a8818a6 and remove the four registry JSON files.

change: Replaced the planned shared username/password gate with Cloudflare Access and approved Google OAuth identities; added repository-side authentication architecture and governance documentation.
reason: Remove password storage and reset responsibilities, support user-level revocation and preserve zero additional subscription cost at the current scale.
rollback: Remove aios/security/cloudflare-access-google-oauth.md and restore the previous decisions.json and change-log.json revisions. Cloudflare dashboard settings are separate.

change: Added a Cloudflare Pages Function at /private-test/ that confirms successful Access authentication, displays the authenticated email header and provides a logout test.
reason: Provide a safe, no-secret test target before placing a real private dashboard behind Google OAuth.
status: Repository implementation complete; external setup pending
rollback: Delete functions/private-test/index.js and aios/security/private-login-test.md. Cloudflare Access policies must be removed separately.

change: Removed the obsolete 1Password or Bitwarden dependency, introduced vendor-neutral secret metadata, added a machine-readable production manifest and validation assets, and recorded Grok login testing as deferred.
reason: Turn approved decisions into consistent executable assets without overstating external OAuth deployment.
rollback: Revert this feature branch or close its draft pull request without merging.
